id="engine" label="micewriter-engine<br>sidecar"><mxCell style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="400" y="100" width="160" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell></object><object id="rocksdb" label="RocksDB PVC"><mxCell style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#FFE6CC;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="420" y="250" width="120" height="80" as="geometry"/></mxCell></object><object id="minio" label="MinIO S3"><mxCell style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="700" y="50" width="120" height="80" as="geometry"/></mxCell></object><object id="nessie" label="Nessie Catalog"><mxCell style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="700" y="200" width="120" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell></object><mxCell id="edge1" value="SDK UDS send" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="sandbox" target="engine"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="edge2" value="Append" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="engine" target="rocksdb"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="edge3" value="Flush (10m)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.75;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=0.75;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="rocksdb" target="engine"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell><mxCell id="edge4" value="Parquet Files"
